title: inula verbascifolia subsp. heterolepis
intro: Inula verbascifolia subsp. heterolepis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, characterized by its unique leaves and flowers. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high content of inulin, a polysaccharide with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Inula verbascifolia subsp. heterolepis include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the roots and flowers of Inula verbascifolia subsp. heterolepis are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
